fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the warehouse journal batch.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the warehouse journal batch.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason code, a supplementary source code that enables you to trace the entry.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series from which entry or record numbers are assigned to new entries or records.

fields.name: Registering No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code used to assign document numbers to the warehouse entries that are registered from this journal batch.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the location where the journal batch applies.

fields.name: No. of Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of lines in this journal batch.

fields.name: Assigned User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who is responsible for the document.
